schedule.heading: Your monthly subscription
schedule.awaiting: Your subscription is active. Waiting for your coach to upload your training schedule — your subscription month starts the day the schedule is uploaded.
schedule.activeCard: Your training schedule started on {startDate} and runs until {endDate}.
schedule.motivation: Sticking to your training days this month is the key to results — every session you commit to brings you closer to your goal and to better health.
schedule.reminder: Your subscription is ending soon — it ends on {endDate}. Renew now to continue without interruption and keep your progress.
schedule.ended: Your subscription ended on {endDate}. Renew now to continue without interruption and keep your progress.
schedule.reminderSubject: Your Qwaam subscription is ending soon

coach.awaitingScheduleTooltip: The trainee has paid and their subscription is active, but no training schedule has been uploaded yet — their month starts the day the schedule is uploaded.

scheduleManager.heading: Monthly schedule subscription
scheduleManager.noStartDesc: Monthly schedule plan with no start date. Set the real start date to begin the month (it auto-starts on the first schedule upload).
scheduleManager.pickRealDateHint: Pick the trainee's real start date (not necessarily today if she started training earlier).
scheduleManager.confirmConvertTitle: Confirm switch to the monthly model
scheduleManager.confirmConvertBody: This trainee will move to the monthly subscription model: she'll see a date countdown instead of sessions, and be enrolled in renewal reminders. Make sure the start date is correct.

brand.name: Qwaam
brand.tagline: Your journey to a better body starts here

hero.title: Transform your body,
hero.subtitle: Custom training and nutrition programs designed for you — because every body has a different story.

coaching.title: Expert Coaching
coaching.desc: Certified coaches with years of experience in body transformation.

nutrition.title: Precision Nutrition
nutrition.desc: Meticulously calculated meals tailored to your goal — cutting or bulking.

nutrition.locked: Nutrition isn't included in your subscription. Add the nutrition package to access your meal plan.
nutrition.awaiting: Your coach is putting together your calorie plan now...

builder.planSubtitle: Create a meal plan (one or more days) and assign it to a trainee.

science.title: The Science Behind Qwaam

pendingPayment.header: Your receipt has been received and is being reviewed by your coach. No need to re-upload — it'll be confirmed soon.
